/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.1", "profile_name": "tpch_project_profile", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.tpch_dbt.stg_lineitem"} */

  create or replace view
    "iceberg"."tpch_mart_staging"."stg_lineitem"
  security definer
  as
    with source_lineitem as (
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch"."lineitem"
),

renamed_cleaned as (
    select
        l_orderkey as order_id,
        l_partkey as part_id,
        l_suppkey as supplier_id,
        l_linenumber as line_number,
        l_quantity as quantity,
        l_extendedprice as extended_price,
        l_discount as discount,
        l_tax as tax_rate,
        l_returnflag as return_flag,
        l_linestatus as line_status,
        l_shipdate as ship_date,
        l_commitdate as commit_date,
        l_receiptdate as receipt_date,
        l_shipinstruct as ship_instruction,
        l_shipmode as ship_mode,
        l_comment as comment
    from source_lineitem
)

select * from renamed_cleaned

    "iceberg"."tpch_mart_staging"."stg_orders"
  security definer

),

renamed_cleaned as (

        o_comment as comment
    from source_orders
)

adapter_response.query:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.1", "profile_name": "tpch_project_profile", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.tpch_dbt.mart_revenue_summary_y1992"} */

  
    

    create table "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1992"
      
      
    as (
      with orders as (
    -- One-year slice for 1992 to keep each batch lightweight
    select *
    from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_staging"."stg_orders"
    where order_date >= date '1992-01-01'
      and order_date <  date '1993-01-01'
),

lineitem_agg as (
    -- Pre-aggregate lineitem per order to reduce join size and memory usage
    select
        order_id,
        line_status,
        sum(
    extended_price * (1 - discount)
) as net_revenue
    from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_staging"."stg_lineitem"
    where ship_date >= date '1992-01-01'
      and ship_date <  date '1993-01-01'
    group by 1, 2
)

select
    o.order_priority,
    l.line_status,
    count(*) as total_orders,
    sum(l.net_revenue) as total_net_revenue
from lineitem_agg l
join orders o on l.order_id = o.order_id
group by 1, 2
    )

group by 1, 2

adapter_response.query:
/* {"app": "dbt", "dbt_version": "1.10.1", "profile_name": "tpch_project_profile", "target_name": "dev", "node_id": "model.tpch_dbt.mart_revenue_summary"} */

  create or replace view
    "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary"
  security definer
  as
    

-- Union yearly aggregates to keep each batch small and memory friendly
with yearly as (
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1992"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1993"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1994"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1995"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1996"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1997"
    union all
    select * from "iceberg"."tpch_mart_mart"."mart_revenue_summary_y1998"
)

select
    order_priority,
    line_status,
    sum(total_orders) as total_orders,
    sum(total_net_revenue) as total_net_revenue
from yearly
group by 1, 2
order by total_net_revenue desc
